cleanWinObjectives.text: Your bot lane stacked dragons and controlled Baron. How much of this win came from objective setup?

firstBlood.text: You found first blood and the map opened up from there. Was that a prepared play or a read in the moment?

resultWin.text: An important win with strong objective control. How do you assess the team's performance today?

closeGame.text: The game got difficult, but you found the comeback late. What changed in the team's communication?

underperformancePressure.text: Your bot lane struggled under pressure tonight. Is this becoming a pattern?

draftLoss.text: After draft, it looked like you lacked tools for the key fights. Do you accept that part of the series was lost there?

draftWinFlexibility.text: The draft gave you several win conditions and the team looked comfortable changing plans. Was that flexibility the main idea?

baronThrowLoss.text: The call around Baron ended up turning the game. Was that a shotcalling mistake or an execution mistake?

baronControlWin.text: Your Baron control was very clean and forced the opponent to answer late. How much had you worked on that setup?

visionControlLoss.text: The opponent denied you vision in the decisive moments, and that shaped the objectives. What broke down in your map control?

starPlayerCarry.text: Your carry decided another huge game. How do you give them space to shine without putting too much responsibility on them?

starPlayerSlump.text: One of your key players has not found their level in recent weeks. Are you concerned about their confidence?

midlanePressureMap.text: Mid lane pressure shaped a lot of the map movements. Was mid the piece you wanted to activate from the start?

toplaneIsland.text: Your top laner spent much of the game isolated, almost on an island. Was that tactical or an adaptation to the opponent's draft?

teamfightExecutionLoss.text: In the decisive teamfights, the coordination was missing and the opponent punished every engage. What did you lack to close those fights?

mentalResetAfterLoss.text: That is a tough loss for the group. How do you protect the room so it does not carry into the next series?

rivalryWeekPressure.text: Rivalry week brings noise outside the game and pressure on the Rift. Does preparing this match feel different?

playoffBestOfSeries.text: In a best-of series, adjustments matter so much. How important is it to adapt quickly between games?

comebackLossHeartbreak.text: You came very close to completing the comeback, but the finish slipped away. How do you process a loss like that?

stompWinHumility.text: You won with real authority and barely gave them a way in. How do you keep the team humble after a game like that?

stompLossAccountability.text: The loss was clear from the opening minutes. What responsibility do you take as staff for a game that difficult?

creditPreparation.label: Professional
creditPreparation.text: The players earned that through draft prep and clean objective calls.

admitDraftMistake.label: Admit draft mistake
admitDraftMistake.text: The draft did not give us the best tools, and that is on us. We have to learn from it without hiding from it.

calmRivalry.label: Calm the rivalry
calmRivalry.text: We understand what it means to the fans, but for us it still has to be a well-prepared game played with a clear head.

challengeRoster.label: Challenge the roster
challengeRoster.text: That level is not enough. Players and staff alike have to compete with more presence from the first minute.

creditOpponent.label: Credit opponent
creditOpponent.text: The opponent played the key moments better. Recognising that is the first step toward fixing what we lacked.

demandReset.label: Demand reset
demandReset.text: We have to reset standards immediately; pressure is part of playing at this level.

defendDraft.label: Defend draft
defendDraft.text: The draft plan made sense for what we wanted to play. The difference was how we executed the important windows.

focusNextSeries.label: Focus next series
focusNextSeries.text: We need to review honestly, but we cannot stay stuck here. The next series starts with our mental reset.

keepHungry.label: Keep hungry
keepHungry.text: It is a good win, but it does not change our standards. If we want to compete at the top, tomorrow we work the same way.

leanIntoRivalry.label: Lean into rivalry
leanIntoRivalry.text: These games are played with something extra. We like that pressure, and we want our fans to feel we came for everything.

praiseShotcalling.label: Praise shotcalling
praiseShotcalling.text: The calls were very clear, especially around waves and objectives. When the team communicates like that, the plan looks much stronger.

protectPlayer.label: Protect player
protectPlayer.text: I am not going to single out a player publicly. We win and lose as a team, and we will do the analysis inside.

stayMeasured.label: Stay measured
stayMeasured.text: One result does not define our form. We review it and move forward.

takeResponsibility.label: Take responsibility
takeResponsibility.text: Responsibility starts with me. If the team was not ready for those moments, we have to correct that from the staff.

playerPressureReset.body:
{{player}} has asked for a private reset after a rough scrim block. Their morale is at {{morale}}, and they feel stage pressure is starting to affect team comms.

"I need to reset before this pressure follows me into the next series, coach."

playerStageTimeRequest.body:
{{player}} came in frustrated about limited stage reps. They feel their scrims have been strong and want clarity on what earns a spot in the next series.

"If I'm not in the stage plan, I need to know what has to change."

playerHighFormCheckin.body:
{{player}} checked in after a strong run of solo queue and team practice. They're enjoying the draft room clarity and believe the roster is close to finding another level.

"Keep the structure like this and I'll bring that confidence onto stage."

playerContractPressure.body:
{{player}} wants clarity before the next league window. With {{days}} days left on the deal, they ask whether they remain part of the roster plan or should prepare for other offers.

"I need to know if this project still has a place for me after the split."

onboarding.title: Getting Started
onboarding.description: Complete these steps to prepare your team for the upcoming season. Staff are especially important — they boost training and recovery.

onboarding.hireStaffDesc: Staff boost training quality and recovery — hire a Coach and Physio
onboarding.setTacticsDesc: Choose a game plan and play style that fits your squad
onboarding.configTrainingDesc: Pick a focus and schedule to develop your players
onboarding.readMessagesDesc: Important info from the board and staff awaits

home.todayScrimReviewDetail: Choose how to turn today's scrim into learning.
home.recommendationHighRisk: High risk: consider cancelling and reviewing before forcing more volume.
home.recommendationNormalRisk: Manageable risk: continue if you need reps, cancel if recovery is a priority.

cancelScrims.desc: Cancel the next block and switch to corrective work.
cancelScrims.benefits: Protects recovery and reduces immediate risk.
cancelScrims.costs: Loses planned volume for the day.
cancelScrims.when: When team state is unstable and quality is dropping.

continueBlock2.desc: Keep the plan and play the second block.

vodReview.desc: Review VOD to extract concrete learning from mistakes.

mentalReset.desc: Prioritize morale and reset tilt before next sessions.

targetedDrills.desc: Run focused drills on the detected issue.

offerRest.desc: Offer rest after a good block to protect condition.

dayOff.desc: Give the rest of the day off and recover.

pushThrough.desc: Push volume despite the setback to maximize reps.

scrimFeedback.cancelledDetail: Choose a corrective follow-up to close the day.

home.todayScrimDetail: Choose how to use today's scrim block.
home.todayTrainingDetail: No scrim locked ? use the day to train and recover.

scrims.freeDayOff: Give the rest of the day off

season.preseasonFocus: Use this time to prepare your squad, review transfer business, and get ready for the opening day.
season.standingsLocked: League standings will unlock after competitive matches begin.
season.tournamentsPreseasonHint: Competition tables and award races will appear once the season gets underway.

squad.noPlayers: No players found in your squad.

squad.benchDragHint: Use the bench list to drag players directly onto the Rift.

playStyleDescriptions.Balanced: Keeps your team measured in and out of possession, with a steady shape and fewer extremes.
playStyleDescriptions.Attacking: Pushes more bodies forward, creates extra support around the box, and asks your team to take more initiative.
playStyleDescriptions.Defensive: Makes your team protect space first, stay compact, and reduce the risk of getting exposed behind the ball.
playStyleDescriptions.Possession: Encourages your team to circulate the ball patiently, control the tempo, and look for cleaner openings.
playStyleDescriptions.Counter: Invites your team to break forward quickly after regaining the ball, attacking space before the opponent resets.
playStyleDescriptions.HighPress: Asks your team to close down earlier, win the ball higher up the Rift, and keep opponents under pressure.

tactics.rolesHint: Choose your leadership hierarchy and objective specialists from the current Starting Five.
tactics.noStartersForRoles: Set your starting five to assign team roles and objectives.
tactics.riftInteractionHint: Drag players between the Rift and bench, click one player to inspect them, click a second player to compare them, then confirm the swap in the compare panel.
tactics.selectSecondPlayer: Select a second player in the lineup view to compare attributes and prepare the swap.
tactics.compareSelectionHint: Review both players below, then confirm the swap when you're ready.
tactics.selectPitchPlayer: Select a player in the lineup view to inspect their attributes.
tactics.selectAnotherToSwap: Select a second player to compare them and confirm the swap.

Top.label: Top
Top.description: Play for top: priority resources and ganks on top side.

Mid.label: Mid
Mid.description: Mid is the map axis: tempo control and rotations.

Bot.label: Bot
Bot.description: Invest in bot lane to scale for fights and objectives.

Early.label: Early game
Early.description: Look for a lead before minute 14 with an aggressive pace.

Mid.label: Mid game
Mid.description: Power spike in mid game with objective setups.

Late.label: Late game
Late.description: Prioritize scaling and execution in extended teamfights.

Ganker.label: Gank
Ganker.description: Lane pressure jungle: punish mistakes early.

Invader.label: Invade
Invader.description: Enter enemy jungle to deny resources and vision.

Farmer.label: Farm
Farmer.description: Maximize farm to hit mid/late game stronger.

Enabler.label: Enable
Enabler.description: Jungle enables carries with cover and tempo.

TopToBot.label: Top -> Bot
TopToBot.description: Open top side to end pathing toward bot side.

BotToTop.label: Bot -> Top
BotToTop.description: Open bot side to impact top in early windows.

FrontToBack.label: Front to back
FrontToBack.description: Structured teamfight: front line protects the carry.

Pick.label: Pick
Pick.description: Play vision and picks to fight with an advantage.

Dive.label: Dive
Dive.description: Explosive entries to enemy backline to remove carries.

Siege.label: Siege
Siege.description: Range and structure pressure without overextending.

Lane.label: Play lane
Lane.description: Support prioritizes bot 2v2, peel, and wave control.

RoamMid.label: Roam mid
RoamMid.description: After reset, roam mid for picks and vision control.

RoamTop.label: Roam top
RoamTop.description: Early top rotations for dives, grubs, and map tempo.

lol.gamePlanDescription: These tactics define how your team plays in simulation. They affect role impact and macro behavior (objectives/tempo) during the match. They are also used in scrims, pre-match tweaks, and between maps in Bo3/Bo5 series.
lol.tip: Tip: if coherence score is low, align strong side + jungle pathing + game timing.

training.recoveryNote: Players will prioritise reset, rest, and condition recovery on all training days.
training.trainingAppliedNote: Training is applied on scheduled training days when you advance time. Rest days provide full recovery.

staffAdvice.critical: Fitness crisis! {{criticalCount}} player(s) in critical condition. {{scheduleAdvice}}
staffAdvice.ok: Squad fitness is high. You could switch to Balanced or Intense for more development.

scheduleAdvice.criticalIntense: Switch to a Balanced or Light schedule immediately.
scheduleAdvice.criticalBalanced: Consider a Light schedule or Mental Reset / Recovery.
scheduleAdvice.criticalLight: Set focus to Mental Reset / Recovery until fitness improves.
scheduleAdvice.warnIntense: A Balanced schedule would give more recovery time.
scheduleAdvice.warnBalanced: A Light schedule could help the squad bounce back.
scheduleAdvice.warnLight: Mental Reset / Recovery would maximise fitness recovery.

Scrims.label: Ranked Grind
Scrims.desc: SoloQ volume for tempo, reactions, and decision speed

VODReview.label: SoloQ Review
VODReview.desc: Review your replays to fix repeated mistakes

IndividualCoaching.label: Micro & Trading
IndividualCoaching.desc: Sharpen mechanics, lane trading, and discipline

ChampionPoolPractice.label: Champion Pool
ChampionPoolPractice.desc: Expand playable picks and key matchup reps

MacroSystems.label: Laning & Personal Macro
MacroSystems.desc: Improve wave control, tempo, and personal rotations

MentalResetRecovery.label: Mental Reset
MentalResetRecovery.desc: Low load to reset tilt and recover focus

Low.label: Low
Low.desc: Gentle session — less fatigue, slower growth

High.label: High
High.desc: Intense drills — faster growth, more fatigue

Intense.label: Intense
Intense.detail: Maximum player development. Only Sunday off. Risk of fatigue buildup.

Balanced.label: Balanced
Balanced.detail: Train Mon, Tue, Thu, Fri. Rest Wed, Sat, Sun. Recommended for most squads.

Light.label: Light
Light.detail: Train Tue & Thu only. Prioritises recovery. Good after heavy match congestion.

groups.trainingGroupsDesc: Assign players to groups with different training focuses. Ungrouped players use the team default.
groups.noGroups: No training groups created. Add a group and assign players to customise their training.

scrims.title: Weekly scrims
scrims.description: Plan scrims by day. Opponent strength is calculated from each rival's active five; stronger rivals accelerate scrim growth.
scrims.weeklyObjectiveDescription: Define what you want to learn this week. The objective guides reports and gives Plan A/B/C intent.

staff.pickObjective: Pick a weekly objective before touching rivals: without intent, volume only creates noise.
staff.mentalReset: Prioritize Mental Reset or VOD Review: the streak is already hurting learning quality.
staff.reduceCancellations: Reduce cancellations this week; scrim reputation is competitive infrastructure too.
staff.moreVolumeForPool: To expand champion pool you need at least 4 blocks; two scrims are not enough sample.
staff.noPlannedOpponents: The objective is right, but no rivals are locked: set at least Plan A so the week has direction.
staff.draftPrepPlan: Use Plan A/B/C against strong teams: you want to pressure draft, not farm cheap confidence.
staff.strongerOpponents: For this objective you need rivals that make you uncomfortable; find at least one block against a stronger team.
staff.softerMentalWeek: Mental week: do not open with every rival above your level. Mix in one controlled block to rebuild confidence.
staff.addFallbacksForReputation: Your planned rivals have better scrim reputation; add Plan B/C or you will eat avoidable rejections.
staff.macroReview: Mark a VOD Review block: if the issue is objective setup, more scrims without review repeat the mistake.
staff.narrowFocus: Average quality is low; keep the volume, but narrow the focus before adding more rivals.
staff.keepPlan: The current plan is healthy: keep the objective, choose demanding rivals, and review the first report before increasing volume.

staff.noStaffMatch: No staff members match your filters.

finances.facilityScrimsRoomEffect: Improves scrim quality and team reps.
finances.facilityAnalysisRoomEffect: Improves VOD review and match preparation.
finances.facilityRecoverySuiteEffect: Improves player recovery and treatment support.
finances.facilityContentStudioEffect: Improves sponsor activation and content operations.
finances.facilityScoutingLabEffect: Improves scouting quality and information depth.
finances.hubExpansionRequired: Expand offices to unlock this module

transfers.transferFeedbackCounterHeadline: They want more before shaking hands.

transfers.transferFeedbackRejectedDetail: The proposal did not move them enough. You would need a stronger fee, closer to {{fee}}, to reopen serious talks.
transfers.transferFeedbackPlayerRejectedDetail: The club accepted, but the player rejected the move after reviewing role, wages, and sporting project.

playerProfile.releaseContractConfirm: Release this player and pay a termination fee?

playerProfile.transferOfferFailed: Could not send the offer. Please try again.
playerProfile.renewalBlocked: Talks are blocked after your earlier decision
playerProfile.renewalCooledOff: Previous talks cooled off, so this starts as a fresh conversation.
playerProfile.renewalDelegateMissingReport: Assistant report did not include this player.
playerProfile.renewalFeedbackCalmDetail: This is mostly a business conversation for now. Timing matters, but the relationship is not under real strain yet.
playerProfile.renewalFeedbackFirmHeadline: They want stronger terms before moving.
playerProfile.renewalFeedbackFirmDetail: The discussion is still open, but wage level and contract length need to feel clearly worthwhile from their side.
playerProfile.renewalFeedbackTenseDetail: Low trust, low morale, or contract pressure are making the camp push hard. Another weak offer could shut the door.
playerProfile.renewalFeedbackAcceptedHeadline: They liked the package and moved quickly.
playerProfile.renewalFeedbackAcceptedDetail: The offer landed close enough to their expectations, so the talks stayed constructive.
playerProfile.renewalFeedbackAcceptedLateHeadline: They accepted, but there was not much patience left.
playerProfile.renewalFeedbackAcceptedLateDetail: You got the deal done after a tougher exchange. Their side were close to walking away from the discussion.
playerProfile.renewalFeedbackBlockedHeadline: They are not reopening the conversation yet.
playerProfile.renewalFeedbackBlockedDetail: Your earlier stance is still shaping the mood here, so their camp will not engage again for now.

draft.title: Draft
draft.noChampionsForFilters: No champions available with the current filters.
draft.warnCounterLastPick: Careful with {{champion}}: it is countering your last pick.
draft.warnTimingIdentity: We are missing a clear timing identity. Look for an Early or Late pick to close better.
draft.warnRoleCoverage: We still have role gaps. Add a more flexible pick.
draft.tip1: Target rival comfort picks in first ban phase.
draft.tip2: Secure lane priority with your early picks.
draft.tip3: Avoid comps without clear engage or front-to-back.

coachBan.0: If we leave {{champion}} open, {{player}} punishes us: {{mastery}}% mastery.
coachBan.1: {{champion}} is pure comfort for {{player}} ({{mastery}}%). I would remove it in bans.
coachBan.2: Ban priority: {{champion}}. {{player}} plays it at a {{mastery}}% level.
coachBan.3: Do not give away {{champion}}; {{player}} already showed {{mastery}}% on that pick.
coachBan.4: Early ban on {{champion}}. That matchup is dangerous in {{player}}'s hands ({{mastery}}%).
coachBan.5: I am worried about {{champion}}: {{player}} looks very comfortable ({{mastery}}%).

playerCounterPick.0: Pick me {{champion}}. I win the matchup into {{enemy}}.
playerCounterPick.1: Give me {{champion}}; I can break lane against {{enemy}}.
playerCounterPick.2: With {{champion}} I get real advantage over {{enemy}}. Trust me.
playerCounterPick.3: {{champion}} is the right answer into {{enemy}}. Leave it to me.
playerCounterPick.4: If they go {{enemy}}, I want {{champion}}: I studied that lane.
playerCounterPick.5: Comfort plus counter pick: {{champion}} into {{enemy}}. This is the moment.

playerSmartCounterPick.0: Please pick {{champion}} for me; with my game read I can break this matchup into {{enemy}}.
playerSmartCounterPick.1: With {{champion}} I can outplay {{enemy}} from wave 1. Give me that pick.
playerSmartCounterPick.2: {{enemy}} gets exposed if you give me {{champion}}. I can snowball it.
playerSmartCounterPick.3: I have perfect timing to punish {{enemy}} with {{champion}}.
playerSmartCounterPick.4: Trust me: {{champion}} vs {{enemy}} is technical advantage for us.
playerSmartCounterPick.5: This matchup heavily favors me: {{champion}} into {{enemy}}. I want to play it.

playerComfortPick.0: I feel very solid on {{champion}} ({{mastery}}% mastery).
playerComfortPick.1: If you give me {{champion}}, I can guarantee consistency ({{mastery}}%).
playerComfortPick.2: {{champion}} is my most reliable pick right now ({{mastery}}%).
playerComfortPick.3: I am comfortable carrying with {{champion}} ({{mastery}}% mastery).
playerComfortPick.4: {{champion}} gives me early impact and control ({{mastery}}%).
playerComfortPick.5: I want {{champion}}; I practiced it a lot ({{mastery}}%).

playerBanRequest.0: Can we ban {{threat}}? It is one of the few picks that shuts down my {{champion}}.
playerBanRequest.1: If we remove {{threat}}, my {{champion}} becomes much freer.
playerBanRequest.2: I need {{threat}} out; it hurts the plan too much with {{champion}}.
playerBanRequest.3: Ban {{threat}} and I can play {{champion}} with much more pressure.
playerBanRequest.4: {{threat}} is a hard counter to {{champion}}. Better remove it now.
playerBanRequest.5: If you want me on {{champion}}, the best move is removing {{threat}}.

lolResult.performanceHeader: Performance · K / D / A · CS · Gold

match.otherMatchesUnavailable: Other match context unavailable for this match yet.

pressReport.bodyIntro: Speaking after the {{result}} result, the {{team}} manager addressed the press.
pressReport.bodyOutro: The conference covered the result, tactical approach, and what lies ahead for the team.
pressReport.bodySingle: The {{team}} manager spoke briefly after the {{result}} result.
pressReport.bodyNone: The {{team}} manager declined to speak at length after the {{result}} result.

questions.win: A strong result today, {{userScore}}-{{oppScore}} against {{oppName}}. How pleased are you with the performance?
questions.loss: A tough result today, losing {{userScore}}-{{oppScore}} to {{oppName}}. What went wrong out there?
questions.draw: A {{userScore}}-{{oppScore}} draw against {{oppName}}. Is that a fair result?

humble.text: The players worked hard. We prepared well and executed the game plan.

confident.text: We were the better side from start to finish. A deserved result.

deflect.text: It's just three points. We move on to the next one.

accept.text: We weren't good enough today. We have to look at what went wrong.

defiant.text: I don't think we deserved to lose. We created enough chances.

deflect.text: I'd rather not dwell on it. We'll be ready for the next match.

fair.text: It was a fair result. Both teams had chances.

frustrated.text: We should have won that. Too many missed opportunities.

positive.text: A point is a point. There are positives to take from today.

questions.scored: {{playerName}} scored today. How important is their contribution to the team?
questions.default: Can you comment on {{playerName}}'s performance today?

praise.text: {{playerName}} has been fantastic. They're a key player for us and their work rate is exemplary.

demanding.text: {{playerName}} can do better. I expect more from a player of their quality.

deflect.text: I don't like to single out individuals. It's a team game.

tactics.question: Can you talk us through your tactical approach today?

detailed.text: We set up to control the midfield and use our width. I think the shape worked well.

brief.text: We had a plan and the players executed it. That's all that matters.

evasive.text: I'd rather not give away too much. Every team has their secrets.

questions.win: The fans were in great voice today. What does their support mean to you?
questions.loss: Some fans voiced frustration at full time. Do you have a message for them?
questions.draw: The atmosphere was tense at times today. How do you manage that pressure?

grateful.text: The fans are incredible. They drive us forward every match and we owe them performances like today.

shared.text: We all celebrate together — players, staff, and supporters. This is their victory too.

deflect.text: The fans know what we're about. We just focus on the game.

apologize.text: I understand their frustration completely. They deserve better and we'll work hard to deliver.

patience.text: I ask for patience. We're building something and bad days happen. We'll come back stronger.

curt.text: I won't comment on things said in the heat of the moment. Let's move on.

appreciate.text: I appreciate every single supporter who comes to watch us. Their energy lifts the team.

understand.text: They want to see us win and so do I. We'll keep pushing until the results come.

curt.text: I don't get involved with what happens in the stands. My focus is on the game.

ahead.question: What's your focus going into the next match?

focused.text: Recovery first, then preparation. We take it one game at a time.

ambitious.text: We want to keep building momentum. The target is clear.

curt.text: Next question, please. We'll worry about that when it comes.

match.swapPrompt: Select a bench player to swap with

endOfSeason.statsArchived: Player stats will be archived. A new schedule will be generated.
endOfSeason.newScheduleReleased: The new schedule has been released. Good luck!

welcome.body0:
The board of directors at {{team}} is delighted to welcome you as the new manager.

We have high hopes for your tenure and believe you can lead this club to glory. Your first task will be to review the squad and prepare a tactical plan for the upcoming season.

We wish you the best of luck.
welcome.body1:
On behalf of the entire {{team}} family, we are thrilled to announce your appointment as manager.

The fans are eager to see your vision for the team. Please take time to assess the squad, review our financial position, and set your tactical approach.

The board stands behind you.
welcome.body2:
Welcome to {{team}}! The supporters and staff are excited about the future under your guidance.

We recommend you start by reviewing your squad's strengths and weaknesses, then set up your preferred formation and training regime.

The upcoming season will be a true test — make us proud.

schedule.subject: Season Schedule Released
schedule.body0:
The {{league}} schedule has been released. The season kicks off on {{start}}.

Review the match list and ensure your squad is ready for the challenges ahead. Pre-season preparation will be crucial.
schedule.body1:
Match list confirmed! The {{league}} season begins on {{start}}.

Study the opening matches carefully — a strong start can set the tone for the whole campaign. Make sure your key players are match-fit.

preMatch.subject: Upcoming: vs {{opponent}} ({{venue}})
preMatch.body0:
Your {{venue}} match against {{opponent}} is coming up on {{matchDate}}.

Matchday {{matchday}} of the Premier Split. Make sure your starting five is in good shape and your tactics are set.

Make the most of playing at {{venue}}.
preMatch.body1:
Reminder: you face {{opponent}} {{venue}} on {{matchDate}}.

This is Matchday {{matchday}} — review your squad fitness and consider any tactical adjustments.

body.victory0:
Full time: {{home}} {{homeGoals}} - {{awayGoals}} {{away}}.

An excellent result! The team put in a strong performance. Matchday {{matchday}} — keep this momentum going.
body.victory1:
Final whistle: {{home}} {{homeGoals}} - {{awayGoals}} {{away}}.

Three points in the bag! The lads showed great character out there. Matchday {{matchday}} complete.
body.defeat0:
Full time: {{home}} {{homeGoals}} - {{awayGoals}} {{away}}.

A disappointing result. We'll need to regroup and work on the areas that let us down. Matchday {{matchday}} — there's still time to turn things around.
body.defeat1:
Final score: {{home}} {{homeGoals}} - {{awayGoals}} {{away}}.

Not the result we wanted. Matchday {{matchday}} — the board will want to see improvement. Review what went wrong and prepare for the next challenge.
body.draw:
Full time: {{home}} {{homeGoals}} - {{awayGoals}} {{away}}.

A point earned in Matchday {{matchday}}. Depending on results elsewhere, this could be valuable. The team fought hard but couldn't find a winner.

staffAdvice.subject: Staff Report — Coaching Vacancies
staffAdvice.body:
Boss, I've had a look at the staff situation at {{team}} and wanted to flag a few things:

• A good Coach will significantly improve training effectiveness — your players will develop faster.
• A qualified Physio helps with injury prevention and speeds up recovery between matches.
• Our Scouts can help identify transfer targets and assess opponents.

I'd strongly recommend filling any vacancies before the season starts. You can find available staff in the Staff section.

Check it out when you get a chance.

boardExpect.subject: {{team}} — Season Objectives
boardExpect.body:
The board has set the following expectations for this season:

• Reach the top half of the LEC table
• Maintain financial stability
• Develop academy talent for the roster pipeline

Meeting these objectives will strengthen your position. Failure to meet minimum expectations may result in a review of your tenure.

We trust in your abilities.

boardObjectives.subject: Season {{season}} — Board Objectives
boardObjectives.body:
The board has set the following objectives for this split:

1. Finish in the top {{expectedPos}}
2. Win at least {{winTarget}} series
3. Win at least {{goalsTarget}} maps

Meeting these targets will improve the board's confidence in your roster management, draft preparation, and stage performance. Failure to meet expectations may result in reduced budgets or further consequences.

boardObjectiveReview.subject: Season {{season}} — Board Objective Review
boardObjectiveReview.body:
The board has completed its end-of-split objective review. You delivered {{metCount}}/{{total}} objectives.

Manager satisfaction impact: {{satisfactionDelta}}.

This review reflects competitive performance across the split: final standing, series wins, map wins, draft preparation, and roster execution.

financeCritical.subject: URGENT: Club in Debt
financeCritical.body:
The club is currently €{{amount}} in debt. This is an unsustainable situation.

The board demands immediate action to address the financial crisis. Consider selling players, reducing staff, or finding alternative income.

Failure to resolve this may have serious consequences for your position.

financeWarning.subject: Financial Warning — Low Reserves
financeWarning.body:
Our financial reserves are running low. At the current burn rate (€{{weeklyWages}}/week in wages), we have approximately {{weeksLeft}} weeks of funding remaining.

I'd recommend reviewing the wage bill and exploring ways to boost income.

wageOverBudget.subject: Wage Bill Exceeds Budget
wageOverBudget.body:
Our annual wage bill (€{{annualWages}}) currently exceeds the allocated wage budget (€{{wageBudget}}).

While we can sustain this in the short term, the board would prefer to see the wage bill brought under control.

seasonPayout.subject: Season {{season}} Prize Money Awarded
seasonPayout.body: The board has confirmed a prize payout of €{{amount}} for your {{position}}-place league finish. The amount has been added to the club balance.

body.champion:
Congratulations! {{team}} are league champions! What an incredible achievement.

The board is absolutely delighted with your performance. You finished on {{points}} points.

We look forward to defending the title next season.
body.topFour:
A solid season for {{team}}. You finished in {{position}}{{suffix}} place with {{points}} points.

The board is satisfied with the campaign. Let's push for the title next season.
body.midTable:
{{team}} finished the season in {{position}}{{suffix}} place with {{points}} points.

A mid-table finish. The board expects improvement next season. We need to be more competitive.
body.lowerHalf:
A disappointing season for {{team}}. Finishing {{position}}{{suffix}} with only {{points}} points is below expectations.

The board is concerned. Significant improvement will be needed next season, or your position may come under review.

newSeasonSchedule.subject: Season {{season}} — New Schedule Released
newSeasonSchedule.body:
The schedule for Season {{season}} has been released! The new campaign kicks off in 4 weeks.

Use this break to assess your squad, make any necessary changes, and prepare for the challenges ahead.

Good luck!

body.intense:
Boss, we have a serious fitness crisis. {{criticalCount}} players are in critical condition and at risk of injury:

{{players}}

Average squad fitness is at {{avgCondition}}%. With the current Intense schedule (6 days training), the squad is being pushed too hard. Switching to a Balanced schedule would give them recovery time.

If we push them further without rest, injuries are inevitable.
body.balanced:
Boss, we have a serious fitness crisis. {{criticalCount}} players are in critical condition and at risk of injury:

{{players}}

Average squad fitness is at {{avgCondition}}%. Even on a Balanced schedule, the squad needs attention. Consider switching to a Light schedule temporarily.

If we push them further without rest, injuries are inevitable.
body.light:
Boss, we have a serious fitness crisis. {{criticalCount}} players are in critical condition and at risk of injury:

{{players}}

Average squad fitness is at {{avgCondition}}%. The squad is already on a Light schedule — the issue may be high training intensity. Consider reducing intensity.

If we push them further without rest, injuries are inevitable.

body.intense:
Boss, the squad is looking tired. Average fitness is {{avgCondition}}% and {{exhaustedCount}} players are below 40% condition.

Switching to a Balanced schedule would give the squad more recovery time.

We should consider giving the lads some rest before the next match.
body.balanced:
Boss, the squad is looking tired. Average fitness is {{avgCondition}}% and {{exhaustedCount}} players are below 40% condition.

A Light schedule for a few days could help the squad bounce back.

We should consider giving the lads some rest before the next match.
body.light:
Boss, the squad is looking tired. Average fitness is {{avgCondition}}% and {{exhaustedCount}} players are below 40% condition.

The squad is already on a Light schedule, so recovery should come naturally. Just keep an eye on any particularly exhausted players.

We should consider giving the lads some rest before the next match.

encourage.label: Encourage them
encourage.description: Show empathy and encourage the player to keep working hard.

promiseTime.label: Promise more playing time
promiseTime.description: Tell them they'll get their chance — bigger morale boost but sets expectations.

workHarder.label: Tell them to work harder
workHarder.description: Tough love approach — could backfire or motivate them.

explain.label: Explain the situation
explain.description: Calmly explain squad competition and rotation. Steady morale boost.

promiseChance.label: Promise them a chance soon
promiseChance.description: They'll be happier but will expect to start in upcoming matches.

proveYourself.label: Tell them to prove themselves
proveYourself.description: Challenge them to earn their place. Risky — could motivate or frustrate.

praiseBack.label: Return the praise
praiseBack.description: Tell them how much you value their contribution.

stayProfessional.label: Stay professional
stayProfessional.description: Acknowledge their form but keep things measured.

higherExpectations.label: Set higher expectations
higherExpectations.description: Challenge them to reach an even higher level. Could push or pressure.

reassure.label: Reassure them about renewal
reassure.description: Tell them you want them to stay. Big morale boost.

noncommittal.label: Be noncommittal
noncommittal.description: Keep your options open. Player may become unsettled.

noRenewal.label: Tell them you won't renew
noRenewal.description: Honest but brutal. Morale will tank.

encourage.positive: Player feels a bit better. Morale {{delta}}

moraleCrisis.promiseTime: Player is reassured by the promise. Morale {{delta}}. They'll expect to start soon.

workHarder.negative: Player is offended by the tough love. Morale {{delta}}

benchComplaint.promiseChance: Player is excited about the opportunity. Morale {{delta}}. They expect to start next match.

proveYourself.positive: Player is fired up to prove their worth. Morale {{delta}}
proveYourself.negative: Player feels dismissed and insulted. Morale {{delta}}

happyPlayer.praiseBack: Player beams at the praise. Morale {{delta}}

higherExpectations.positive: Player rises to the challenge. Morale {{delta}}
higherExpectations.negative: Player feels the pressure is unfair. Morale {{delta}}

contractConcern.reassure: Player is reassured about their future. Morale {{delta}}

noncommittal.positive: Player grudgingly accepts for now. Morale {{delta}}
noncommittal.negative: Player is unsettled and unhappy. Morale {{delta}}

contractConcern.noRenewal: Player is devastated. Morale {{delta}}. They may affect the dressing room.
contractConcern.noRenewalWithDressingRoom: Player is devastated. Morale {{delta}}. They may affect the dressing room. The dressing room mood dips — {{affected}} teammates lose morale.

sponsor.subject: Sponsorship Offer — {{sponsor}}
sponsor.body:
Good news, boss! {{sponsor}} has expressed interest in becoming a sponsor of {{team}}.

They are offering a weekly payment of €{{amount}} over the next 12 weeks in exchange for advertising space at the training ground.

This seems like a reasonable deal, but it is your call.

decline.label: Decline politely
decline.description: Turn down the offer. No financial impact.

trainingInjury.subject: Injury — {{player}} ({{injury}})
trainingInjury.body0:
Bad news from the training ground. {{player}} has picked up a {{injury}} during today's session.

The medical team estimates {{days}} days on the sidelines. We'll monitor the recovery closely.
trainingInjury.body1:
Unfortunately, {{player}} went down in training today with a {{injury}}.

Initial assessment: out for approximately {{days}} days. We'll keep you updated on their progress.

mediaPositive.subject: Positive Press — {{player}}
mediaPositive.body:
The local papers are running a very positive piece on {{player}} today.

They are highlighting their excellent recent form and commitment to {{team}}. This kind of coverage is great for the player's confidence and the club's image.

mediaNegative.subject: Negative Press — {{player}}
mediaNegative.body:
Some unflattering coverage of {{player}} appeared in the tabloids today.

Journalists are questioning their form and commitment to {{team}}. This could affect the player's morale — you might want to have a word.

intlCallup.subject: International Call-Up — {{player}}
intlCallup.body:
{{player}} has been called up to the {{nationality}} national team for an upcoming international window.

This is a great honor for the player and reflects well on the club. They'll be in good spirits when they return, though keep an eye on their fatigue levels.

community.body0:
{{team}} hosted a community open day at the training ground today.

Fans got to meet the players and watch a training session. The atmosphere was fantastic and it's done wonders for team spirit.
community.body1:
Several first-team players from {{team}} volunteered for a youth coaching session at a local school.

Great PR for the club, and the players seem energized by the experience.
community.body2:
The club has organized a charity initiative in partnership with a local foundation.

{{team}} continues to build strong ties with the community. The board is pleased with the positive image.

moodReport.subject: Dressing Room Report — Mood: {{mood}}

boardConfidence.subject: Board Meeting — Results Under Scrutiny
boardConfidence.body0:
The board has called an urgent meeting. Three consecutive defeats have raised serious concerns about the team's direction.

"We need to see improvement quickly. The fans are restless and results must change."

How do you respond?
boardConfidence.body1:
After a string of poor results, the chairman has summoned you for a difficult conversation.

"We backed you with resources and time. The results simply aren't good enough. What's your plan?"

Choose your response carefully.

reassureBoard.label: Reassure them with a plan
reassureBoard.description: Present a clear strategy for turning things around. Buys you time.

acceptPressure.label: Accept responsibility
acceptPressure.description: Own the poor results. The board respects honesty.

blameCircumstances.label: Point to injuries and bad luck
blameCircumstances.description: Deflect blame to external factors. May or may not convince them.

fanPetition.subject1: Fan Petition — Give academy talent stage time
fanPetition.body0:
A group of {{team}} supporters has launched a petition asking for more proactive drafts and earlier map tempo.

"We want to see identity from minute one, not passive scaling every game."

Over 500 signatures already. How do you respond?
fanPetition.body1:
Supporters of {{team}} are asking you to give more stage time to academy players and fresh prospects.

"The future of our org depends on developing talent, not benching it forever."

The campaign is gaining traction online. What's your response?
fanPetition.body2:
An open letter from the {{team}} supporters' group calls for more transparency from the competitive staff.

"Explain the direction: draft identity, roster plan and playoff goals."

Esports media have picked it up. How do you handle this?

listenFans.label: Engage with the fans
listenFans.description: Meet with fan representatives and listen to their concerns. Good for morale.

ignoreFans.label: Focus on the game
ignoreFans.description: Politely decline — game decisions stay within the team.

addressPublicly.label: Make a public statement
addressPublicly.description: Address the petition in a press conference. Transparent and proactive.

rivalInterest.subject: Roster Rumour — {{player}} linked with {{rival}}
rivalInterest.body0:
We've received word that {{rival}} have started making moves for {{player}}.

Their staff were seen reviewing recent series and solo queue data, and sources suggest a formal approach could arrive soon.

How do you want us to respond if they make contact?
rivalInterest.body1:
Esports media are reporting that {{player}} is now a concrete target for {{rival}}.

The player has drawn attention after recent stage performances. There is no formal bid yet, but pressure is building fast.

What's your stance?

notForSale.label: Not for sale
notForSale.description: Make it clear the player is going nowhere. Boosts their morale.

openToOffers.label: Open to offers
openToOffers.description: Signal willingness to negotiate. Player may become unsettled.

noComment.label: No comment
noComment.description: Stay quiet and let things play out. Neutral stance.

moraleCrisis.subject: {{player}} — Morale Crisis
moraleCrisis.body0:
Boss, {{player}} has asked for a private meeting. They seem really down lately and want to talk about their situation at the club.

Their morale is at {{morale}} — you should address this before it affects the dressing room.
moraleCrisis.body1:
{{player}} has been looking dejected in training. They've requested a chat with you about their current state of mind.

Morale: {{morale}}. How you handle this could make or break their confidence.

benchComplaint.subject: {{player}} — Wants More Game Time
benchComplaint.body0:
Boss, {{player}} has come to see you. They're frustrated about their lack of game time in recent matches and want to know what they need to do to get back in the team.

"I feel like I've been training well, but I'm not getting a chance to show it in the game."
benchComplaint.body1:
{{player}} knocked on your office door looking unhappy. They haven't featured in the last few matches and want answers.

"I came to this club to play. If I'm not in your plans, I'd rather you tell me straight."

happyPlayer.subject: {{player}} — Feeling Great
happyPlayer.body0:
{{player}} stopped by your office with a big smile. They're feeling great about their form and the team's direction.

"Just wanted to say I'm really enjoying the game right now, boss. The mood in the team is fantastic."
happyPlayer.body1:
Your assistant mentions that {{player}} has been in excellent spirits lately. They approached you after training.

"Boss, I'm loving every minute here. Keep things going like this and I'll run through walls for you."

contractConcern.subject: {{player}} — Contract Running Down
contractConcern.body0:
{{player}} has approached you regarding their contract situation. With only {{days}} days remaining on their deal, they want to know where they stand.

"Boss, my contract is running down. I need to know if I'm part of your plans going forward or if I should start looking elsewhere."
contractConcern.body1:
Your assistant flags that {{player}}'s contract expires in roughly {{months}} month(s). The player has been asking around the dressing room about their future.

It might be wise to have a conversation before they become unsettled — or before other clubs start circling.

delegatedRenewals.subject: Assistant Report — Contract Renewals
delegatedRenewals.body: Boss, I went through our renewal list at {{team}}. {{successes}} completed, {{stalled}} still pending, {{failures}} failed.

notes.managerBlocked: You told me not to reopen contract talks yet.
notes.completed: I was able to close this one without needing you to step in.
notes.beyondLimits: Their camp want around €{{wage}}/wk for {{years}} years, which is beyond the delegation limits.
notes.boardWagePolicy: Board wage policy blocks this renewal. Keep annual wages near €{{budget}} while we recover.
notes.prefersManager: They would listen, but they still want about €{{wage}}/wk for {{years}} years and prefer to hear from you directly.
notes.relationshipBlocked: They are not willing to commit through me under the current relationship and contract situation.

scoutReport.subject: Scout Report: {{player}}
scoutReport.body: Your scout {{scout}} has completed their assessment of {{player}}. Full report available in the scouting section.

boardWarning.subject: Board Concern — Performance Review
boardWarning.body: The board is growing increasingly concerned with recent results at {{team}}. Your position will come under serious review if there is no improvement in the near future.

boardFinalWarning.subject: Final Warning — Immediate Improvement Required
boardFinalWarning.body: This is your final warning. The board at {{team}} has lost patience with the current run of results. Unless there is an immediate and significant improvement, we will have no choice but to consider your position.

boardFired.subject: Notice of Dismissal — {{team}}
boardFired.body: The board of directors at {{team}} has decided to relieve you of your duties as manager, effective immediately. We thank you for your service and wish you well in your future career.

jobOffer.subject: Managerial Vacancy — {{team}}
jobOffer.body:
The board at {{team}} ({{city}}) is looking for a new manager to lead the club forward. Last season finish: {{league_position}}.

After reviewing your credentials, we believe you could be the right fit. Would you be interested in taking on this challenge?

jobHired.subject: Welcome to {{team}}
jobHired.body: The board of directors at {{team}} is delighted to welcome you as the new manager. We look forward to working with you and achieving great things together.

jobRejection.subject: Application Update — {{team}}
jobRejection.body: Thank you for your interest in the managerial position at {{team}}. After careful consideration, we have decided to pursue other candidates. We wish you the best in your future career.

transferComplete.subject: Transfer Complete: {{player}}
transferComplete.body:
The transfer of {{player}} has been completed for a fee of {{fee}}.

The player has joined the squad and is available for selection.

transferOffer.subject: Incoming Offer for {{player}}
transferOffer.body: {{club}} have submitted an offer of {{fee}} for {{player}}. Review the bid in the Transfers tab to accept or reject it.

potentialReport.subject: Potential report completed
potentialReport.body: Scouting finished evaluating {{player}}. New potential estimate: {{potential}}.

scrimWeekly.subject: Weekly Scrim Staff Report

recommendations.lockPlans: Lock Plan A/B/C earlier next week so the staff has usable prep data.
recommendations.reduceCancellations: Reduce cancellations next week; scrim reputation is part of your competitive infrastructure.
recommendations.resetBeforeVolume: Open next week with Mental Reset or VOD Review before adding more volume.
recommendations.narrowFocus: Keep the volume but narrow the focus around the recurring issue; quality is too noisy right now.
recommendations.targetedDrills: Schedule Targeted Drills for the recurring issue and keep the main prep block stable.
recommendations.keepPlan: Keep the current plan: it is producing useful reps without overloading the roster.

patchNotes.subject: Patch {{label}} Notes

academyWeeklyEmpty.subject: Academy weekly report
academyWeeklyEmpty.body: Academy {{academy}} has no active players this week. Review acquisition and promotion flow to keep your pipeline healthy.

academyWeekly.subject: Academy weekly report: {{academy}}

positive.subject0: Esportmaníacos praises {{player}} — the desk is unanimous
positive.body0:
The Esportmaníacos panel spent a good chunk of today's stream on {{player}} at {{team}}.

"Nothing to criticize this week. The guy is absolutely dominating." The positive coverage should give confidence a boost in the locker room.
positive.body1:
The Esportmaníacos tertulianos rarely agree on anything, but {{player}} got a full pass today: "Consistent, solid, no dips in form. One of the best players in the league right now. {{team}} should do everything to keep him."

Good for morale — and for the market value.

negative.subject0: Esportmaníacos goes after {{player}} — panel shows no mercy
negative.body0:
The Esportmaníacos panel did not hold back today on {{player}}: "The guy has completely disappeared. What happened to him this split? {{team}} can't keep relying on a player performing like this."

This kind of coverage tends to hit morale hard. Worth having a word with the player.
negative.body1:
Today's Esportmaníacos tertulianos session turned into a full breakdown of {{player}}'s recent form. The verdict: "Inconsistent. No regularity. Some days at top level, others completely invisible. {{team}} deserves better output from a player in that role."

Keep an eye on the player's morale.

allio.subject0: Al Lío Podcast — Transfer rumour: {{player}} being tracked
allio.body0:
Eros dropped a transfer hint on today's Al Lío episode: "I'm hearing things about {{player}}. Multiple teams have been asking questions. Nothing confirmed yet, but the mercato around {{team}} is heating up."

Keep this in mind when planning your squad for next split.
allio.subject1: Al Lío Podcast — Eros hints at incoming deal for {{team}}
allio.body1:
Eros has been dropping hints on the latest Al Lío episode: "I've been told there are conversations happening around {{team}}. Something is being cooked. I can't give names yet but stay tuned — this mercato is far from over."

Could be noise, could be real. Worth watching.
allio.subject2: Al Lío Podcast — League format leak, Eros breaks it down
allio.body2:
Today's Al Lío episode went off-script when Eros revealed a potential leak: "I've been told the league is planning changes to the split format. Not confirmed, but my sources are usually reliable. This could shake up how teams build their rosters."

If true, this could affect your long-term planning.
allio.subject3: Al Lío Podcast — Big move incoming, league shaken up
allio.body3:
Eros went live on Al Lío with what he called a "bombazo": "There's a significant player movement about to happen in the league that nobody is talking about yet. I'll just say this — some teams are going to have to rethink their rosters completely."

Stay alert — the market is moving.

rivalInterest.subject: Al Lío Podcast — {{player}} linked with {{rival}}
rivalInterest.body0:
Eros opened the latest Al Lío episode with a bombshell: "I have information that {{rival}} have started making moves for {{player}}. Their analysts have been reviewing recent series and solo queue data for weeks. No formal offer yet, but things are heating up fast."

What's your stance if they make contact?
rivalInterest.body1:
Al Lío Podcast has exclusively reported that {{player}} is now a concrete target for {{rival}}.

According to Eros, the player attracted attention after recent stage performances. No formal bid yet, but pressure is building fast.

What's your stance?

up.subject0: el_yuste — even Yuste admits: viewership is up this week
up.body0:
Yuste surprised his stream with a rare positive take: "I'll be honest — the numbers are up this week and I'm not going to pretend otherwise. When the matches are good, the audience comes. Simple."

A positive moment for the whole scene.
up.subject1: el_yuste — this week's matches actually got Yuste excited
up.body1:
Not something you hear every day: Yuste was enthusiastic on his morning stream. "This week delivered. Real matches, proper stakes, viewers who stayed till the end. This is what the league can be when it tries."

Good week to be in esports.

down.subject0: el_yuste — league viewers are tanking and nobody cares
down.body0:
Antonio Yuste opened his morning stream with a full rant: "The numbers don't lie. Viewership is going down week after week and the league keeps doing the same things expecting different results. C'est fini if nothing changes."

Just background noise — but when Yuste talks, the community listens.
down.subject1: el_yuste — the league product is broken, according to Yuste
down.body1:
Yuste spent a solid thirty minutes analysing the league's declining engagement on his morning stream: "I've been saying this for months. The product isn't good enough. The format bores people, the scheduling kills momentum. The data is clear."

Harsh, but Yuste's audience takes it seriously.

matchReport.body1:
The series closed {{home}} {{homeGoals}} - {{awayGoals}} {{away}} in Matchday {{matchday}}. Both teams traded draft adaptations, objective setups and late-game calls.

Player of the match: {{playerOfMatch}}
matchReport.body2:
Matchday {{matchday}} delivered another competitive series between {{home}} and {{away}} ({{homeGoals}}-{{awayGoals}}). Fans got draft pivots and objective fights all the way.

Player of the match: {{playerOfMatch}}
matchReport.body0:
Matchday {{matchday}} wrapped with {{home}} {{homeGoals}} - {{awayGoals}} {{away}}. The result can influence standings momentum as the split progresses.

Player of the match: {{playerOfMatch}}

roundup.headline0: Matchday {{matchday}} Round-Up: {{totalMaps}} Maps Across the Rift
roundup.headline1: League Matchday {{matchday}}: All the Series Results
roundup.headline2: Drafts, Objectives and Maps Define Matchday {{matchday}}

standings.headline1: League Table: {{leader}} Control the Top Spot

seasonPreview.headline0: Split Preview: {{teamCount}} Teams Battle for the Top Spot
seasonPreview.headline2: Can {{favourite}} Control the Meta? Split Preview
seasonPreview.body:
The league is set to kick off with {{teamCount}} teams entering the split.

Analyst predictions have {{favourite}} as the early favourites, but {{darkHorse}} could be the dark horse to watch this campaign.

With coaching staffs refining draft prep, this split promises to be one of the most competitive in recent memory. Every map will matter as the playoff race heats up.

Teams: {{teamList}}

weeklyDigest.headline: Weekly Power Rankings — Week of {{weekStart}}
weeklyDigest.bodyNoTopPerformer: The latest weekly power rankings are here. {{leader}} lead the table, and {{storylineCount}} storyline(s) are shaping the league this week.
weeklyDigest.bodyWithTopPerformer: The latest weekly power rankings are here. {{leader}} lead the table, while {{topPerformer}} heads the kill participation charts with {{topPerformerPlays}} standout play(s). {{storylineCount}} storyline(s) are shaping the league this week.

titleRace.headline: Top Spot Race Tightens — {{leader}} Lead {{challenger}} by {{gap}} Point(s)
titleRace.body: {{leader}} remain in front, but {{challenger}} are only {{gap}} point(s) behind as the playoff race takes shape.

unbeatenStreak.headline: {{team}} Extend Series Run to {{runLength}}
unbeatenStreak.body: {{team}} have gone {{runLength}} series without a loss and are building real momentum around drafts and objectives.

transferRumour.headline: {{player}} Complete Move to {{to}}
transferRumour.body: {{to}} have completed the signing of {{player}} from {{from}} for {{fee}}.

AerialDominance.desc: Commands the box in the air

sacked.title: You've Been Sacked
sacked.subtitle: The board has lost confidence in your ability to manage the club.
sacked.dismissalLetter:
The board of directors has decided to relieve you of your duties as manager of {{team}}, effective immediately.

We thank you for your service and wish you well in your future career.

Yours sincerely,
The Board of Directors

jobs.hired: You have been appointed Head Coach!

updater.title: Update Available
updater.description: A new version ({{version}}) is available. Your save games will be preserved.
